expectations.evidence: File report.json parses as valid JSON with correct syntax

expectations.text: The output identifies the O(n²) nested loop in findDuplicates
expectations.evidence: H10 at line 120: 'O(n²) nested loop for duplicate detection'

expectations.text: The output identifies N+1 database queries in processOrders
expectations.evidence: H02 at line 26: 'N+1 query problem — individual queries per order ID'

expectations.text: The output identifies string concatenation with += in a loop (SQL building)
expectations.evidence: H03 at line 38: 'String concatenation in loop building SQL'

expectations.text: The output identifies reading one byte at a time in readConfig
expectations.evidence: H07 at line 88: 'File read byte-by-byte without buffering'
